title: leucanthemum barrelieri
intro: Leucanthemum barrelieri, also known as the Barrelier's daisy or Pyrethrum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leucanthemum barrelieri include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. Leucanthemum barrelieri is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
